title: Fiery Shattering Spice Croatian Pork Pilaf
description: Spicy Croatian pork pilaf with crispy shattering effect, perfect for a date night dinner.
instructions: Heat ghee in a medium bento box over medium-high heat. Add the chopped onion and cook until slightly caramelized, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add smoked paprika, cumin, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Add chopped pork shoulder and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-6 minutes.
Add 1 cup of water to the bento box and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover with a lid, and simmer for 20 minutes, or until the pork is tender.
Stir in chopped parsley and cook for 1 more minute.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
Use a spatula to create shattering effect on the pork by gently pressing down on the meat.
